alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). The Codex Alimentarius Commission establishes maximum levels (MLs) for contaminants to be legally permitted in food or feed commodities to protect human health. Specific MLs are detailed in standards such as CXS 193-1995.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Food products placed on the market must comply with food safety criteria.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance with food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005, requiring shelf-life studies and sampling procedures. Mandatory procedures (shelf-life studies, sampling) for food business operators manufacturing RTE food to manage L. monocytogenes risk.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Production process hygiene
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required from Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Food production processes must comply with process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration on pre-packaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific mandatory expiration date requirements must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory compliance. All food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore must comply with the regulatory limits on food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must have technological justification and not present health risks. Food additives are allowed when there is a technological justification and they do not present health risks to consumers.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell, unless SFA approval. If a food product contains an additive that is not permitted, it must not be imported or sold, unless an application to SFA for evaluation is submitted.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory compliance. All food businesses must comply with the regulatory limits on incidental constituents (contaminants) in food.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA's regulatory limits. Contaminants in food sold in Singapore must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. Food products containing contaminants or incidental constituents that exceed regulatory limits must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations prohibits the import or sale of meat and any food derived from meat which contains residues of diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, or dienoestrol.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in list of ingredients. All ingredients and additives used in prepacked foods for sale in Singapore must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mandatory Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish. These allergens must be declared if present as an ingredient or food additive in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Mandatory Allergen Declaration (Sulphite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Sulphite must be declared if the residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Modified: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Food Products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited. New: Foods listed as prohibited must not be produced, imported, or sold.. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale exists and must be consulted.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Substances listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189) as prohibited from use in food are labeled 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 1. This is a guidance level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an action level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Cochineal extract and carmine must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens (contains statement)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The allergen's food source must be declared immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a “contains” statement.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens (parentheses)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The name of the food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the name of the ingredient.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-free claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A (defined standard for gluten content). A final rule defines 'gluten-free' for food labeling. Compliance requirements also exist for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the 'gluten-free' claim.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Specificity in Major Food Allergen Labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The type of tree nut (e.g., almonds, pecans, walnuts), and the species of fish (e.g., bass, flounder, cod) and Crustacean shellfish (e.g., crab, lobster, shrimp) must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Sulfiting agents must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration in the food is ≥10 parts per million total sulfites.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This standard specifies the varieties, scope of use, and maximum usage levels of food additives.

alerts.title: Modified: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in spices
alerts.details: New: Prevention and reduction required. A Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Maximum levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required from Union list in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008. Food additives must be approved for use in the EU and comply with their conditions of use.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives and their conditions of use
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Union list of food additives in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: New: Verification required from Council Decision 95/410/EC, Decision 2004/235/EC, Decision 2003/644/EC, Regulation (EC) No 1688/2005, Regulation (EC) No 853/2004, and Regulation (EC) No 2160/2003. Special guarantees apply to trade from Sweden, Finland, Norway, and other EU countries/regions with equivalent control programmes for certain animal products.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine) and process hygiene criteria
alerts.details: Old: Compliance with Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Additive Limits - Additive declaration and limits in pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for additive declaration and permitted limits in pre-packaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs, including content, format, and mandatory information, must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific mandatory shelf life periods and labelling requirements for food products must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Data label requirements for packaged products
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Optional shelf life periods

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Quantity declaration in prepackaged packages

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/sodium declaration on pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for salt/sodium declaration (e.g., nutritional information) in pre-packaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full standard.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Halal food general requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their maximum limits
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declarations
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling and display requirements
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Salt / Sodium Limits - Declaration of salt/sodium content and related claims
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - All food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific additive limits for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Modified: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required. Specific provisions for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive must be verified by consulting Circular Letter Number 2 Year 2026.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for allergen declaration for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific contaminant limits for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Classification
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The classification of food products, including seasoning and snack foods, must adhere to the categories defined in BPOM Head Regulation Number 34 Year 2019. This classification is crucial for determining applicable regulatory requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General labelling
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General labelling requirements for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Definition
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General Compliance
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological parameters
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiology limits for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium content
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific salt/sodium limits for seasoning and snack products, as well as other processed foods, must be verified by consulting the relevant regulations listed under 'Pangan Olahan' on the BPOM JDIH website.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of approved food additives and their limits is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific specifications and standards for food additives is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Use of additives
alerts.details: Old: Only MHLW-specified safe additives allowed. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific limits under the Positive List System for Agricultural Chemical Residues in Food is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of regulations concerning BSE in food is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Food Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific specifications and standards for food contaminants is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific limits for food contaminated by radioactivity is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contamination, foreign substances, or other grounds causing harm
alerts.details: Old: Not allowed. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Diseases, abnormalities, or death
alerts.details: Old: Not allowed for sale. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Residues of agricultural chemicals, feed additives, veterinary drugs
alerts.details: Old: Must not exceed MHLW-specified safe quantities. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Toxic or harmful substances
alerts.details: Old: Not allowed (unless specified safe by MHLW). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Labelling
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of general food labelling requirements under the Specifications and Standards is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses, Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of specific requirements for health claims, food for special dietary uses, and nutrition labeling is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Recombinant DNA Techniques
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of regulations for food produced by recombinant DNA techniques, including potential labelling requirements, is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Certification of sanitation
alerts.details: Old: Required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
